friends.enterTarget: Enter a username or friend code.
friends.respondChallengeFailed: Could not respond to the challenge

game.botFailed: Bot failed to move — try a different bot style.

byok.keyRejected: The provider rejected the key. Check that it was pasted completely.
byok.modelNotFound: The provider could not find that model (or base URL). Check the model name.
byok.rateLimited: The provider rate-limited the request. The key works — try again in a minute.
byok.providerServerError: The provider had a server error. Try again shortly.
byok.unreachable: Could not reach the provider or the app server. Check your connection.
byok.relayedSuffix: (relayed via the app server — check key and model).
